title: Builder's Toolkit Core
description: Improved graphics, performance and QOL with this simple modpack focusing on core features and vanilla aesthetic for builders.
body:
![Builder's Tookit logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3683e392d314b7289f89f7aa768338ffb20f4e7.png)

### One version to rules them all

We bundle **ViaFabricPlus** allowing you to have access to multiplayers from 1.0.0 to 1.21.3.

### Performance

The bundled mods have been carefully selected to be safe in your worlds and provide noticeable speed benefits on any device.

### Works everywhere

**Builder's Toolkit**  does not include content mods, so you can play on any world or server. While you can use any game launcher to play the pack, we recommend **[Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/)** or the official **[Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app)** for the best experience.

## Requirement

### **Builder's Toolkit** require a GPU with OpenGL 4.6 on windows and OpenGL 4.1 on macos:

- an Nvidia Graphics Card from 2012 and upwards (Nvidia Kepler and above are supported)
- an AMD Graphics Card from 2012 and upwards (AMD GCN and above are supported)
- any Graphics Card which currently actively receives driver updates
- any Graphics Card which used to receive driver updates up until or after the release date of the OpenGL 4.6 specification


## FAQ
### Do I need the modpack on the server?
    
  - No, the pack works on all servers that allow vanilla clients.


### What mods does it have?

  - Click any version and scroll down.

## Disclaimer

NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT.
